description: Trigger a TM1 TI process or chore via the TM1 REST API. Wraps a Dagster job around a single ExecuteProcess call, with optional per-parameter overrides for TI processes and wait_for_completion for synchronous chains. Pairs with tm1_resource for auth.

target_name.label: Target Name
target_name.description: Name of the TM1 process or chore to execute.

parameters.label: Parameters
parameters.description: Optional TI parameter overrides. Keys are parameter names (e.g. pYear).

wait_for_completion.label: Wait for Completion
wait_for_completion.description: Wait for the process/chore to finish (default TM1 behavior is synchronous).

timeout_seconds.label: Timeout (s)
timeout_seconds.description: HTTP timeout — TM1 processes can be long. Raises on timeout.
